title: Advanced Golems
description: Spawn small golems that help defend your base
body: ## 🤖 Advanced Golems Advanced golem is a simple mod that adds in a small golem to help you defend an area from hostile mobs. ## 🛠️ Golem To make a golem simply craft the golem spawner and right click on a block ![golem_recipe](https://imgur.com/iB5BQCr.png) A golem has an area of 9 blocks (default) centered around his home position in which he will attack mobs. To configure your golem you need a golem controller ![controller_recipe](https://imgur.com/pYOrwjU.png) The golem controller allows you to remove a golem, change its home position or toggle between its modus of operation. The golem has 4 modi of operation: > Aggressive: In this state the golems wanders around and attacks any mobs coming into the area > Waiting: The golems stays at his home position till a mob wanders in the area > Passive: The golem wanders around but will not attack anything > Standing: The golem stays at his home position and will not do anything else Lastly golems are immortal (changeable in the config). Instead of dying they simply shut down and can be restarted with a **golden apple**. ## 🔩 Golem Upgrades By itself the golem is pretty weak but you are able to give it various items to make it stronger. First a golem can accept and use all normal weapons and armor. Next it can also accept the following items with their respective effect. The items can be changed in the config. > Glistering Melon: Increases golem health > Diamond: Increases golem attack damage in addition to held item > Sugar: Increases move and fly speed. Can be applied up to 10 times > Obsidian: Increases knockback resistance > Ghast tear: Increases golems regenerative powers > Magma cream: Gives golem immunity to fire > Glass: Increases a golems home radius > Carved Pumpkin: Makes golem anger all nearby hostile mobs > Flint: Makes golems projectile only hurt what its targeting > Netherstar: Gives the golem a jetpack so he can fly around. If the golem has a ranged weapon he will try to hover above the mob though he is unable to do it very long without a pause. > Feather: Increases the fly duration of a golem during combat ## 🧩 Integration ### Polymer (Fabric only) 1.1.2+ Supports Polymer so it is possible to have this mod as server side only. Simply set "Polymer" to true on the config. Golems are displayed as baby zombies then.
